content: A curiosity-driven autonomous agent can leverage the catastrophic forgetting mitigation mechanisms from online meta-learning memory consolidation to turn intentional, controlled "forgetting" of outdated low-curiosity exploration memories into a performance advantage. This lets the agent dynamically free up memory capacity to encode new high-value surprising experiences without suffering performance decay on prior learned meta-skills for exploration.
source_topics: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
